content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak — Nifty -1.05%, Bank Nifty -1.06%, VIX +8.55% to 18.28 signaling rising fear. But Pharma (+0.62%) and select FMCG/Healthcare names are showing clear relative strength on Q4 prints. Defensive rotation is the dominant theme; capital goods (POLYCAB at 52w high) and FMCG (TATACONSUM +9.55%, MARICO at 52w high) are absorbing flows. With 42 mins to close and VIX spiking, no new entries — focus on protecting wins via trailing SLs and managing the OPEN TATACONSUM order.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 123.47 vs SL 121.00 — 2% buffer. Gold ETF, low volatility. VIX spike supports safe-haven case. SL is appropriately placed; no MODIFY needed (would be sub-0.5% adjustment)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.3%, CMP 846.90 at 52w high, Q4 print strong (PAT +18%, India volume +9%). Current SL 838 is already above entry (locking ~2.2% gain). CMP-SL gap = ~1.1%, just above the 1% trail floor. No-op MODIFY — leaving SL at 838 (HOLD effectively). Correcting: this is a HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Biggest winner +9.6% on Q4 print (PAT +134%, FY26 revenue +35.9%, Encora consolidation). CMP 1380 vs SL 1365 = 1.1% gap, satisfies 1% trail floor. SL already above entry locking ~8.4% gain. Trimming target to 1450 (still +5% upside from CMP, R:R favorable from here). Stock is overbought after 10% gap; protect the gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2760.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.1%, CMP 2817 vs current SL 2740 (gap 2.7%). Tightening SL to 2760 (just below entry 2785) — gives ~2% buffer to CMP, satisfies 1% trail floor. MACD bullish, Q3 PAT +60%, Dahej capex catalyst intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L flat at +0.0%, CMP 9096 at 52w high on 3.3x volume. Below +2% threshold so no breakeven trail required yet. SL 8950 is 1.6% below CMP — appropriate. HOLD effectively (no-op MODIFY); leaving as is. Correcting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.4%, CMP 10602 vs SL 10440 (~1.5% buffer). Q4 strong (consol PAT +103%, Rs 150 final div, Rs 12,000 buyback), but stock fading off 52w high 10740. SL respects entry thesis; no panic — let SL do its job (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.7%, CMP 479 vs SL 470 (1.9% buffer). Q4 print was strong (PAT +15.75%, India FMCG +9.5%, FY27 guidance raised to low double-digit). Recovering toward entry; respect the SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.8%, CMP 1274.80 vs SL 1255 (1.6% gap, satisfies 1% floor). SL already above entry 1226 (locking +2.4%). Q4 PAT +19%, CDMO growth, but Kotak Sell with TP 800 is a risk. Keeping SL at 1255 — no-op MODIFY, correcting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1225.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.4%, CMP 1265 vs SL 1198 (5.3% gap — far too loose now after +9.55% breakout day). Tightening SL to 1225 — locks in -1.8% from entry as worst case, gap to CMP ~3.2% (well above 1% floor). Q4 print was excellent (revenue +18%, India UVG +16%). NOTE: there is also an OPEN BUY for 20x TATACONSUM @ 1240 from earlier — that order is stale now (stock at 1265, well above limit); should CANCEL but schema lacks explicit CANCEL action. Will flag in portfolio_notes."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.5%, CMP 861 vs SL 850 (1.3% buffer). Q4 order book +61% YoY, strong T&D cycle. Stock at 52w high recently. SL appropriate; respect it."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.0%, CMP 8092 vs SL 7950 (1.8% buffer). HSBC upgrade to Buy TP 9000, May 20 Q4 results pending — that's a binary event within ~7 sessions (outside 3-session rule). Sector strong. Hold with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, CMP 1872 vs SL 1830 (2.2% buffer). Q4 results May 21 (~7 sessions out, outside 3-session rule). Organon deal overhang. Defensive pharma. Hold; will reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.0%, CMP 1648 vs SL 1610 (2.3% buffer). Research turned BEARISH (-0.10): Q4 PAT -15%, Tata 1mg B2C threat, ICICI cut TP to 1460. Weakest thesis in book but SL not hit. Respecting SL per Rule 17 — if it breaks 1610, it exits cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4440.00,
      "new_target": 4830.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.1%, CMP 4534 vs SL 4360 (3.8% gap — loose). Stock made new 52w high today on pharma strength. Tightening SL to 4440 (just below entry 4541 — caps worst-case at -2.2%). CMP-SL gap = 2.1%, above 1% floor. Q4 May 21 (binary event in ~7 sessions — outside 3-session rule). JB Chem merger catalyst intact."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Adequate SL buffer, safe-haven thesis intact with VIX spike."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry locking +2.2% gain; CMP-SL gap 1.1% just above floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "reasoning": "Trimming target to 1450 from 1500 — stock overbought after +9.6% gap, lock realistic upside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2760.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 2740 to 2760, just below entry — caps loss at <1%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "reasoning": "Position flat, SL appropriate; not yet at +2% threshold for breakeven trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamental thesis, SL respects entry sizing; let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 470.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, recovering; SL has buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry locking gain; CMP-SL gap 1.6% above floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1225.00,
      "reasoning": "5.3% gap was too loose post +9.5% breakout day; tighten to 1225 to convert open risk to capped risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 850.00,
      "reasoning": "Order book +61% YoY thesis intact, SL has buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 7950.00,
      "reasoning": "HSBC upgrade, sector strength; Q4 on May 20 — will reassess T-3 sessions per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1830.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive pharma, Q4 May 21 — reassess T-3 per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1610.00,
      "reasoning": "Bearish research overhang but SL not hit; respect SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4440.00,
      "reasoning": "New 52w high today; tighten from 4360 to 4440 to cap worst case at -2.2% from entry."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong BULLISH research candidates surfaced — TATACONSUM (+0.10), DABUR (+0.10), BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.10), COFORGE (+0.10), APOLLOHOSP (+0.08), TORNTPHARM (+0.08), MARICO (+0.08) — but all already held. New non-held BULLISH candidates: CGPOWER (+0.07, held), POLYCAB (+0.07, held), SRF (+0.06, held). Genuinely new candidates not in book: ASIANPAINT (NEUTRAL -0.03 — competitive pressure from Birla Opus/JSW, reject), THERMAX/MCX/BHARATFORG/KOTAKBANK/INFY/HCLTECH/PERSISTENT (not researched in this batch). Deployment at 55%, cash ₹435K. With VIX +8.55% to 18.28 (highest in weeks), Nifty -1.05%, Bank Nifty -1.06%, and 42 minutes to close, this IS a binary-fear day where new entry bar is genuinely higher (Rule 8 spirit). Explicit per-name rejects per Rule 18: ASIANPAINT bearish modifier; THERMAX/BHARATFORG/MCX extended +9% / +5% intraday moves chasing strength into VIX spike = bad R:R; KOTAKBANK / INFY / HCLTECH defensive but no near-term catalyst surfaced in research batch. Pharma/FMCG book exposure is already substantial (SUNPHARMA, TORNTPHARM, LAURUSLABS, LALPATHLAB + MARICO, DABUR, TATACONSUM) — additional adds would breach effective sector clustering.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 55%, below 80% soft target, cash ₹435K. Today's realized P&L -₹28,429 (heavy day — daily loss limit remaining ₹49,988, still ~3.5% headroom). 5-day record poor: 12% win rate, profit factor 0.3x, -₹32,143. The fix is NOT more aggressive new entries on a VIX-spike day; the fix is letting the winners (COFORGE +9.6%, LAURUSLABS +3.8%, MARICO +3.3%) actually run while tightening SLs on the loose ones (TATACONSUM 5.3% gap, TORNTPHARM 3.8% gap, SRF 2.7% gap — all tightened above). OPEN ORDER ATTENTION: BUY 20x TATACONSUM CNC LIMIT @ 1240 from 455 min ago is now stale — CMP 1265, position already filled at avg 1248. This duplicate working order should be CANCELLED (cannot via current schema — will need manual action or it will expire). Similarly HFCL BUY 600x MIS LIMIT @ 133.50 from 7800 min ago (5+ days old) is stale and should be cancelled. Flagging for next cycle. No new BUYs today — protect P&L, let SLs and pharma/FMCG winners do work into close."
}
